PF2ESC.Templar.BarrierPanel.Title: Templar Barrier
PF2ESC.Templar.BarrierPanel.OpenHint: Open/Close the selected actor's Templar barrier UI.
PF2ESC.Templar.BarrierPanel.Empty: Select a token or assign a player character.
PF2ESC.Templar.BarrierPanel.DedicationMi: Templar Dedication not detected on this actor.
PF2ESC.Templar.BarrierPanel.SelectTempla: Select a token with Templar Dedication first.
PF2ESC.Templar.BarrierPanel.SelectedActo: The selected actor does not have Templar Dedication.
PF2ESC.Templar.Choices.DCClassOrSpell: DC {dc} (class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher)
PF2ESC.Templar.Choices.ClassOrSpellDC: your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher
PF2ESC.Templar.Choices.ShieldBlockPrevie: Your raised shield handles this damage with PF2e's normal Shield Block automation.
PF2ESC.Templar.Choices.HoldingPreview: Holding Barrier prevents this damage. Your active barrier loses HP after Hardness, then stores the full unreduced damage if it survives.
PF2ESC.Templar.Choices.HoldingDefenseMas: Because you have Defense Master, the held damage keeps its actual damage type for Barrier Release.
PF2ESC.Templar.Choices.HoldingNoDefenseM: Without Defense Master, Barrier Release is stored as untyped damage that bypasses immunities, weaknesses, and resistances.
PF2ESC.Templar.Choices.LightBurstPreview: You take the triggering damage normally. Your Light Barrier also takes it, applying Hardness, then erupts.
PF2ESC.Templar.Choices.InculpationPrevie: Inculpation functions as Light Burst against only the triggering creature, then applies its dazzled/blinded rider by Reflex save result.
PF2ESC.Templar.Choices.ReactivePreview: Reactive Barrier interposes your Light Barrier. The barrier and you each take the remaining damage after Hardness.
PF2ESC.Templar.Choices.ChooseReaction: Choose how your defenses answer the incoming damage.
PF2ESC.Templar.Choices.MultipleTemplars: {actor} is adjacent to multiple Templars who can intercept this damage.
PF2ESC.Templar.Holding.SustainedEffect.D: Tracks how many holding barrier instances were Sustained this turn.
PF2ESC.Templar.Cards.LightBurst.Summary: Each enemy in a {radius}-foot emanation attempts a basic Reflex save.
PF2ESC.Templar.Cards.BlindingBlade.Summa: The struck creature attempts a Reflex save.
PF2ESC.Templar.Cards.LightGaol.WillSumma: The triggering creature attempts a Will save.
PF2ESC.Templar.Cards.LightGaol.BasicSave: The triggering creature attempts a basic {saveType} save.
PF2ESC.Templar.Cards.BasicReflexSummary: The triggering creature attempts a basic Reflex save.
PF2ESC.Templar.Cards.BlindingBlade.Pendi: After the Strike hits, target the struck creature and roll its Reflex save.
PF2ESC.Templar.Cards.Inculpation.Failure: Dazzled for 1 minute. If the creature is concealed or invisible, negate that condition for 1 round.
PF2ESC.Templar.Cards.Inculpation.Critica: Blinded for 1 round, then dazzled for 1 minute. Concealed or invisible is lost for 1 minute.
PF2ESC.Templar.Cards.LightGaol.CannotMov: You cannot move through the Light Gaol wall.
